expectedIssues: Wrong Poker item is highlighted in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The game rows in both sections are cut off on the right side, leaving the third card partially visible instead of fully fitting within the viewport.
The fixed bottom navigation bar is overlapping the lower game content, obscuring parts of the last visible row.
The top category chip row is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe incorrect highlighting of a Poker item in the bottom nav bar; they describe layout clipping and overlap issues instead.
